'''daraga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:avenacoside|avenacoside]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-r-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:avenacoside|avenacoside]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| daraga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dærægæth|dærægæth]] || [[word:dærægæj|dærægæj]] || [[word:dærægæsh|dærægæsh]] || [[word:dærægæ|dærægæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dararagath|dararagath]] || [[word:dararagaj|dararagaj]] || [[word:dararagash|dararagash]] || [[word:dararaga|dararaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:daragath|daragath]] || [[word:daragaj|daragaj]] || [[word:daragash|daragash]] || [[word:daraga|daraga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:darafgath|darafgath]] || [[word:darafgaj|darafgaj]] || [[word:darafgash|darafgash]] || [[word:darafgaf|darafgaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:daragatha|daragatha]] || [[word:daragaja|daragaja]] || [[word:daragasha|daragasha]] || [[word:daragaka|daragaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:daragath|daragath]] || [[word:daragaj|daragaj]] || [[word:daragash|daragash]] || [[word:daraga|daraga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:daragathal|daragathal]] || [[word:daragajal|daragajal]] || [[word:daragashal|daragashal]] || [[word:daragakal|daragakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:daragathatha|daragathatha]] || [[word:daragajaja|daragajaja]] || [[word:daragashasha|daragashasha]] || [[word:daragaka|daragaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:daragathan|daragathan]] || [[word:daragajan|daragajan]] || [[word:daragashan|daragashan]] || [[word:daragakan|daragakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:daragathaoro|daragathaoro]] || [[word:daragajaoro|daragajaoro]] || [[word:daragashaoro|daragashaoro]] || [[word:daragakaoro|daragakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
